skillSlots.name: Every Second Counts
skillSlots.description: Attacks Randomly 2 times, dealing 120% P.DMG to two Targets per hit with 24% additional Crit Rate.

skillSlots.name: Inferno Trigger
skillSlots.description: Passive: 80% of non-Ultimate Skill DMG is stored as [Time Energy]. When taking active action, consumes all [Time Energy] to attack all enemies for 1200% P.DMG (split evenly among targets, max 400% ATK per target) if [Time Energy] reaches 100%.

effects.name: Time-Devouring Moment
effects.description: All Attacks consume 8% current HP; deals 15% True DMG per 1% HP consumed (max 120% ATK True DMG).

effects.name: Time-Devouring Moment
effects.description: Uses Basic Attack against random enemy when losing 24% HP (max 3 triggers per turn).

effects.name: Time-Devouring Moment
effects.description: Grants 2.4% ATK and Final DMG per 10% [Time Energy] (max 24%).

effects.name: Genesis I
effects.description: 60% of DMG taken is converted into equal [Time Energy].

effects.name: Genesis III
effects.description: [Inferno Trigger] deals 24% of target's current HP as P.DMG (cannot exceed 500% of Caster's ATK).

effects.name: Genesis IV
effects.description: When receiving Fatal DMG, consumes all [Time Energy] to block the DMG, heals equal amount, then dispels 3 Debuffs (once per battle).

effects.name: Genesis V
effects.description: [Inferno Trigger] restores 100% [Time Energy] and immediately recasts when killing (max once per turn).
